description:
Tomorrow’s the day! 
BDS Youth Magandjin’s second annual Sadaqa Iftar 🌙

This year we have decided to donate to Al Ahli Hospital in Gaza, Sudanese kitchen in Sudan, and Shaukat Khanum Cancer Hospital in Pakistan. 🏥

Don’t miss out, get your tickets now! 
📆 Saturday March 7th 2026
⏰ 5:30pm to 9:30pm 
📍 Modwest Building, University of Queensland

✨ 3 Course Meal
✨ Henna & Art
✨ Videos from Gaza, Sudan & Pakistan 

🔗 https://www.eventbrite.com/e/sadaqa-iftar-tickets-1981282460173?aff=oddtdtcreator&utm_source=ig&utm_medium=social&utm_content=link_in_bio

✨UQISC presents MAUJA ✨💃🕺🪩🥂
🚨 correction******* Venue is named The Beaumont Brisbane 🚨

Our official mega launch party — with a bigger, better venue and the same unlimited fun. Expect the best music, and a dance floor that doesn’t stop!!!

Keep an eye on our stories for earlybird tickets, very soon 👀

📍 The Beaumont Brisbane (fortitude valley) ****
📅 14th March
⏰ 6PM – Late
👗 Desi or Indowestern
🚨Strictly an 18+ event

We would love for you to join us! 

#dhurandhar #party #indian #uq #brisbane

🏐 Volleyball Sports Night!! 🏐🎉
(MEMBERS ONLY EVENT!)

日本語は下へ👇

Are you ready to take a break from all your studies?📚

Hit pause in your assignments and come move with us at Volleyball Sports Night! 🙌✨

You don’t need to be experienced in volleyball – just bring yourself and your game spirit. 💥 Whether you’re here to score points or just cheer each other on, this is a night all about connecting, having fun, and shaking off the study stress together! 💪🎉

📅 Thursday 12th March
⏰ 2:00 PM – 4:00 PM
📍 UQ Sport Fitness Centre
🎟 $14 (Members only!)

🏐 バレーボールスポーツナイト!! 🏐🎉
(メンバー限定イベント！)

勉強の合間にひと休みする準備はできていますか？📚

課題は一旦中断して、バレーボールスポーツナイトで一緒に体を動かしましょう！🙌✨

経験は必要ありません。自分自身とゲームスピリットだけを持ってきてください。💥 得点を狙いたい人も、ただお互いを応援したい人も、この夜はみんなで繋がり、楽しみ、勉強のストレスを一緒に吹き飛ばすための夜です！💪🎉

📅 3月12日（木）
⏰ 午後2時～午後4時
📍 UQスポーツフィットネスセンター
🎟 $14（会員限定！）

🍽️ Dinner Outing at Uncle Don’s 🍽️

Need a mid-week break? Come join us for a relaxed dinner night with UQJS ✨
Good food, good chats, and a great chance to unwind together.

This time we’ll be heading to Uncle Don’s West End location for an evening catch-up 🍜
Whether you’re coming with friends or solo, it’s the perfect chance to connect and enjoy some delicious Japanese eats.

Details:
📅 Date: 18th March
⏰ Time: 5pm – 7pm
📍 Location: Uncle Don’s (West End)
🏷️ Price:
Set A Menu (Member): $23
Set B Menu (Member): $26
Set A Menu (Non-Member): $25
Set B Menu (Non-Member): $28

Looking forward to seeing everyone there! 🎉

⸻

🇯🇵 日本語版（修正版）

🍽️ ディナーイベントのお知らせ 🍽️

UQJSのディナーイベントを開催します✨
ちょっと一息つきたい方、友達とゆっくりごはんを楽しみたい方、ぜひ参加してください😊

今回は Uncle Don’s（West End店） での開催です！
みんなで楽しく交流しながら、美味しい日本食を楽しみましょう🍜

詳細：
📅 日付：3月18日
⏰ 時間：17:00 – 19:00
📍 場所：Uncle Don’s（West End店）
🏷️ 参加費:
メニューA (会員): $23
メニューB (会員): $26
メニューA (非会員): $25
メニューB (非会員): $28

みなさんのご参加お待ちしています✨

Sparke Helmore 2027 Sydney Graduate Program Applications are Open!

We are an independent Australian firm with a long history and a big heart, we have a rich story to tell. Our spirit is built on the power of relationships with our people, clients and communities.

To read what our past graduates have to say and for further information on our program: https://www.sparke.com.au/join-us/graduate-program.jsp

To submit your application: Join Us https://sparke.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/en-US/SHL/job/XMLNAME-2027-Graduate-Program—Sydney_JR101837

Applications close Sunday, 5 April 2026 at 11.59pm AEST.
